Return on investment
## Maximize your ROI
You’ll save time and money with Zendesk. But don’t take it from us; take it from Forrester. Their Total Economic Impact™ (TEI) study showed 301% return on investment over three years.
[Read the full study](https://www.zendesk.com/campaigns/total-economic-impact-of-zendesk/?utm_source=footer&utm_medium=webpromo&utm_campaign=Forrester-TEI-2025-Homepage_WW_2025Q3)
  * ### Improve time to value
Zendesk works out of the box. Solve customer problems right away, rather than configuring complex software. 
  * ### Reduce effort per ticket
Self-service and automation deflect up to 25% of agent contacts. Resolve remaining tickets faster with rich customer insights.
  * ### Keep costs low
You don’t need a developer army to start using Zendesk, or an influx of agents to keep using it. Efficiency and automation are baked in.

## Privacy Preference Center
Zendesk uses web cookies to collect information about you when you visit our Site. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device. At Zendesk, we may use this information for purposes that include ensuring basic functionality of our Sites; remembering user preferences, including your cookie preferences; measuring the effectiveness of our Sites, marketing campaigns, and email communications; and personalizing online content.
Please review the different category headings below to learn more and adjust the cookie settings on your current device. Please note that you will need to ensure that each web browser is adjusted to reflect your preferences if you use different computers or mobile devices.
For more information about how Zendesk uses web cookies, please see our [Cookie Notice](https://www.zendesk.com/company/agreements-and-terms/cookie-notice/).

#### Essential Cookies
Always Active
Essential cookies enable core site functionality. These cookies are necessary for the Site to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. You may set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but parts of the website may not function properly.
View Vendor Details
#### Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
Functional cookies enable the Site to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our Site.
View Vendor Details
#### Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
Analytics cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our Site. These cookies help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the Site.
View Vendor Details
#### Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Targeting cookies, such as social media cookies, may be set through our Site by our advertising service providers, third-party advertisers, ad networks, or data exchange partners. These cookies may be used to show you relevant advertising on other third-party sites.

## Secure, compliant AI for finance
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://web-assets.zendesk.com/zendesk/icons/72/Automation.png)
### Automate account and claims inquiries
Instantly handle routine questions—like account updates or policy info—freeing your agents to handle complex, high-value conversations.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://web-assets.zendesk.com/zendesk/icons/72/Sparkle.png)
### Equip agents for high-stakes service
Copilot guides agents with customer context, suggested replies, and a tone tuned for empathy and professionalism that’s critical in financial interactions.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://web-assets.zendesk.com/zendesk/icons/72/Privacy.png)
### Scale securely
Increase support efficiency while staying compliant. Zendesk AI supports data privacy requirements and integrates easily with your core systems.

## Privacy Preference Center
Zendesk uses web cookies to collect information about you when you visit our Site. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device. At Zendesk, we may use this information for purposes that include ensuring basic functionality of our Sites; remembering user preferences, including your cookie preferences; measuring the effectiveness of our Sites, marketing campaigns, and email communications; and personalizing online content.
Please review the different category headings below to learn more and adjust the cookie settings on your current device. Please note that you will need to ensure that each web browser is adjusted to reflect your preferences if you use different computers or mobile devices.
For more information about how Zendesk uses web cookies, please see our [Cookie Notice](https://www.zendesk.com/company/agreements-and-terms/cookie-notice/).

Always Active
Essential cookies enable core site functionality. These cookies are necessary for the Site to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. You may set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but parts of the website may not function properly.

#### Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
Functional cookies enable the Site to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our Site.

#### Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
Analytics cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our Site. These cookies help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the Site.

#### Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Targeting cookies, such as social media cookies, may be set through our Site by our advertising service providers, third-party advertisers, ad networks, or data exchange partners. These cookies may be used to show you relevant advertising on other third-party sites.

How ZENDESK AI WORKS
## From shop floor to customer floor
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://www.zendesk.com/industries/manufacturing/)
### Automate issue resolution
Handle over 80% of product inquiries, service requests, and parts lookups without human intervention.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://www.zendesk.com/industries/manufacturing/)
### Support technical teams
AI Copilot brings your service reps the data they need-from order histories to technical manuals-so they can solve complex cases efficiently.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://www.zendesk.com/industries/manufacturing/)
### Scale support and internal help desks
Empower internal teams with AI that reduces repetitive workload and improves service speed across production, logistics, and IT.

## Resolve supply chain and product issues faster
AI agents manage requests across email, chat, and portals-tracking orders,resolving service needs, and escalating urgent issues automatically

## Privacy Preference Center
Zendesk uses web cookies to collect information about you when you visit our Site. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device. At Zendesk, we may use this information for purposes that include ensuring basic functionality of our Sites; remembering user preferences, including your cookie preferences; measuring the effectiveness of our Sites, marketing campaigns, and email communications; and personalizing online content.
Please review the different category headings below to learn more and adjust the cookie settings on your current device. Please note that you will need to ensure that each web browser is adjusted to reflect your preferences if you use different computers or mobile devices.
For more information about how Zendesk uses web cookies, please see our [Cookie Notice](https://www.zendesk.com/company/agreements-and-terms/cookie-notice/).

Analytics Cookies

Targeting Cookies

Zendesk Contact Center
# AI-powered resolutions for every interaction
Zendesk Contact Center is our new AI-powered solution built on the Resolution Platform. It’s designed with AI at its core to remove gaps between agents, systems, and channels, including voice - simplifying operations and eliminating the fragility of legacy stacks.
Contact Sales[View demo](https://www.zendesk.com/demo/)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%271484%27%20height=%271114%27/%3e)![](https://web-assets.zendesk.com/zendesk/pages/service/contact-center/ZendeskForContactCenter_Hero__en_us.png)
Zendesk for Contact Center
## Contact centers powered by intelligence, not effort
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://www.zendesk.com/service/contact-center/)
### One platform.   
Zero middleware.
Design a contact center on day one, that blends essential real-time capabilities with our AI-powered resolution platform.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://www.zendesk.com/service/contact-center/)
### AI that’s built-in.   
Not bolted-on.
Embed Zendesk AI in every step of the customer journey - supporting what matters when it matters, with full context across all channels.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://www.zendesk.com/service/contact-center/)
### Built for resolution.   
Not complexity.
Deploy a contact center that’s built for global scale and flexibility, while keeping operations simple and cost-effective.
VOICE AI AGENTS
## The most adopted AI in service, now for every channel
Trained on 18+ billion service interactions, Zendesk Voice AI helps your team deliver fast, efficient support on every call - ensuring customers get the help they need, and giving agents the guidance and confidence to excel.

## Frequently asked questions
### What is Zendesk Contact Center?
Zendesk Contact Center is an AI-powered, enterprise-grade solution built on the Zendesk Resolution Platform. It unifies voice, digital, and self-service into a single workspace where AI, agents, and workflows work together to deliver faster, smarter resolutions on every channel.
### How long does it take to deploy Zendesk Contact Center?
Speed matters! Zendesk Contact Center is designed for fast, effortless deployment. With minimal setup, businesses can be up and running in no time, maximizing their Zendesk investment from day one.
### How is Zendesk Contact Center different from Zendesk Voice?
While Zendesk Voice is ideal for smaller teams that require fewer intensive high-volume contacts, Zendesk Contact Center is built to meet the needs of larger, more complex service operations. It adds enterprise-grade voice, advanced routing, outbound campaigns, and core contact center capabilities to the resolution platform, making it a complete CCaaS solution rather than just voice as a channel.
### What makes Zendesk Contact Center truly ‘enterprise-grade’?
Yes. It’s built on AWS infrastructure (Amazon Connect), delivering the same core capabilities, reliability, and scale used by the world’s largest enterprises, supporting 158 countries, 40+ Tier-1 carriers, and 99.9% uptime SLAs. 
### How does Zendesk Contact Center impact my agents’ productivity?
Because it’s built into the same Zendesk platform your teams already use, agents can onboard quickly and stay productive without learning new tools. AI handles note-taking, summarization, and after-call work automatically, while real-time guidance and QA insights keep performance high. The result is a faster, simpler, and more efficient experience where agents spend less time managing systems and more time resolving customer issues.
### How does Zendesk support compliance in regulated industries?
Zendesk Contact Center is compliant with GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2 Type II, and supports data residency controls for voice recordings. Customers in healthcare, finance, and government rely on Zendesk for its security-first architecture.
### What makes Zendesk Contact Center different from other CCaaS voice solutions?
Legacy vendors offer powerful contact center capabilities. However, we understand that AI has laid a new foundation for contact centers without the same limitations of voice technology. We differentiate ourselves by blending those same capabilities with what we already do best as a partner. Zendesk Contact Center replaces traditional complexity with AI-powered simplicity, offering a unified platform that’s faster to implement, easier to manage, and ready to scale globally.

## Privacy Preference Center
Zendesk uses web cookies to collect information about you when you visit our Site. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device. At Zendesk, we may use this information for purposes that include ensuring basic functionality of our Sites; remembering user preferences, including your cookie preferences; measuring the effectiveness of our Sites, marketing campaigns, and email communications; and personalizing online content.
Please review the different category headings below to learn more and adjust the cookie settings on your current device. Please note that you will need to ensure that each web browser is adjusted to reflect your preferences if you use different computers or mobile devices.
For more information about how Zendesk uses web cookies, please see our [Cookie Notice](https://www.zendesk.com/company/agreements-and-terms/cookie-notice/).
Allow All
###  Manage Consent Preferences
#### Essential Cookies
Always Active
Essential cookies enable core site functionality. These cookies are necessary for the Site to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. You may set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but parts of the website may not function properly.
View Vendor Details
#### Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
Functional cookies enable the Site to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our Site.
View Vendor Details
#### Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
Analytics cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our Site. These cookies help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the Site.
View Vendor Details
#### Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Targeting cookies, such as social media cookies, may be set through our Site by our advertising service providers, third-party advertisers, ad networks, or data exchange partners. These cookies may be used to show you relevant advertising on other third-party sites.

Zendesk AI for finance
## Secure, compliant AI for finance
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://web-assets.zendesk.com/zendesk/icons/72/Automation.png)
### Automate account and claims inquiries
Instantly handle routine questions—like account updates or policy info—freeing your agents to handle complex, high-value conversations.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://web-assets.zendesk.com/zendesk/icons/72/Sparkle.png)
### Equip agents for high-stakes service
Copilot guides agents with customer context, suggested replies, and a tone tuned for empathy and professionalism that’s critical in financial interactions.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://web-assets.zendesk.com/zendesk/icons/72/Privacy.png)
### Scale securely
Increase support efficiency while staying compliant. Zendesk AI supports data privacy requirements and integrates easily with your core systems.

Support internal teams with compliant AI
## Make employee service effortless
AI agents handle routine internal requests - like system access, policy lookups, and IT help - while adhering to strict data privacy and compliance standards. Copilots assist with navigating procedures and documentation, helping teams stay efficient and audit-ready.
[Discover employee service](https://www.zendesk.com/employee-service/)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%27742%27%20height=%27557%27/%3e)![Two coworkers reviewing a laptop, with chat bubbles about equipment replacement and a document link](https://www.zendesk.com/industries/financial-services/)
ENTERPRISE-GRADE SECURITY
## Ensure your people only see the data they need to
Zendesk provides you with strong role-based permissions and documentation features, making it easy for your company to demonstrate compliance with major regulations. For the next level of data privacy and security, we offer advanced data privacy and protection.

## Privacy Preference Center
Zendesk uses web cookies to collect information about you when you visit our Site. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device. At Zendesk, we may use this information for purposes that include ensuring basic functionality of our Sites; remembering user preferences, including your cookie preferences; measuring the effectiveness of our Sites, marketing campaigns, and email communications; and personalizing online content.
Please review the different category headings below to learn more and adjust the cookie settings on your current device. Please note that you will need to ensure that each web browser is adjusted to reflect your preferences if you use different computers or mobile devices.
For more information about how Zendesk uses web cookies, please see our [Cookie Notice](https://www.zendesk.com/company/agreements-and-terms/cookie-notice/).
Allow All
###  Manage Consent Preferences
#### Essential Cookies
Always Active
Essential cookies enable core site functionality. These cookies are necessary for the Site to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. You may set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but parts of the website may not function properly.
View Vendor Details
#### Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
Functional cookies enable the Site to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our Site.
View Vendor Details
#### Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
Analytics cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our Site. These cookies help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the Site.
View Vendor Details
#### Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Targeting cookies, such as social media cookies, may be set through our Site by our advertising service providers, third-party advertisers, ad networks, or data exchange partners. These cookies may be used to show you relevant advertising on other third-party sites.

Zendesk AI for manufacturing
# Best-in-class AI manufacturing software
Zendesk AI helps manufacturers deliver faster support for distributors, suppliers, and customers - all while streamlining internal service for operational teams. 
Contact Sales[View demo](https://www.zendesk.com/demo/)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%271293%27%20height=%271725%27/%3e)![Two people checking an order status on a tablet, with on-screen shipping info showing the order is in transit](https://web-assets.zendesk.com/is/image/zendesk/Testimonial_Hero_ai-agents?fmt=webp-alpha&qlt=65)
How ZENDESK AI WORKS
## From shop floor to customer floor
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://www.zendesk.com/industries/manufacturing/)
### Automate issue resolution
Handle over 80% of product inquiries, service requests, and parts lookups without human intervention.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://www.zendesk.com/industries/manufacturing/)
### Support technical teams
AI Copilot brings your service reps the data they need-from order histories to technical manuals-so they can solve complex cases efficiently.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%2764%27%20height=%2764%27/%3e)![](https://www.zendesk.com/industries/manufacturing/)
### Scale support and internal help desks
Empower internal teams with AI that reduces repetitive workload and improves service speed across production, logistics, and IT.
AI agents
## Resolve supply chain and product issues faster
AI agents manage requests across email, chat, and portals-tracking orders,resolving service needs, and escalating urgent issues automatically
[Discover AI agents](https://www.zendesk.com/service/ai/ai-agents)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%271044%27%20height=%27783%27/%3e)![AI chat showing a customer checking furniture delivery status, with a map preview and “Track order” button](https://www.zendesk.com/industries/manufacturing/)
AI Copilot
## Support reps with expert-level insights
Copilots trained on technical documents and workflows assist your support and maintenance teams with suggested actions and instant access to key knowledge.
[Discover AI Copilot](https://www.zendesk.com/service/ai/)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg%20xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%20version=%271.1%27%20width=%271293%27%20height=%27971%27/%3e)![Support chat with AI copilot suggesting a response to reroute a delivery address](https://www.zendesk.com/industries/manufacturing/)

## Privacy Preference Center
Zendesk uses web cookies to collect information about you when you visit our Site. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device. At Zendesk, we may use this information for purposes that include ensuring basic functionality of our Sites; remembering user preferences, including your cookie preferences; measuring the effectiveness of our Sites, marketing campaigns, and email communications; and personalizing online content.
Please review the different category headings below to learn more and adjust the cookie settings on your current device. Please note that you will need to ensure that each web browser is adjusted to reflect your preferences if you use different computers or mobile devices.
For more information about how Zendesk uses web cookies, please see our [Cookie Notice](https://www.zendesk.com/company/agreements-and-terms/cookie-notice/).
Allow All
###  Manage Consent Preferences
#### Essential Cookies
Always Active
Essential cookies enable core site functionality. These cookies are necessary for the Site to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. You may set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but parts of the website may not function properly.
View Vendor Details
#### Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
Functional cookies enable the Site to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our Site.
View Vendor Details
#### Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
Analytics cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our Site. These cookies help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the Site.
View Vendor Details
#### Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Targeting cookies, such as social media cookies, may be set through our Site by our advertising service providers, third-party advertisers, ad networks, or data exchange partners. These cookies may be used to show you relevant advertising on other third-party sites.
View Vendor Details

Zendesk Contact Center
# AI-powered resolutions for every interaction
Zendesk Contact Center is our new AI-powered solution built on the Resolution Platform. It’s designed with AI at its core to remove gaps between agents, systems, and channels, including voice - simplifying operations and eliminating the fragility of legacy stacks.

## Frequently asked questions
### What is Zendesk Contact Center?
Zendesk Contact Center is an AI-powered, enterprise-grade solution built on the Zendesk Resolution Platform. It unifies voice, digital, and self-service into a single workspace where AI, agents, and workflows work together to deliver faster, smarter resolutions on every channel.
### How long does it take to deploy Zendesk Contact Center?
Speed matters! Zendesk Contact Center is designed for fast, effortless deployment. With minimal setup, businesses can be up and running in no time, maximizing their Zendesk investment from day one.
### How is Zendesk Contact Center different from Zendesk Voice?
While Zendesk Voice is ideal for smaller teams that require fewer intensive high-volume contacts, Zendesk Contact Center is built to meet the needs of larger, more complex service operations. It adds enterprise-grade voice, advanced routing, outbound campaigns, and core contact center capabilities to the resolution platform, making it a complete CCaaS solution rather than just voice as a channel.
### What makes Zendesk Contact Center truly ‘enterprise-grade’?
Yes. It’s built on AWS infrastructure (Amazon Connect), delivering the same core capabilities, reliability, and scale used by the world’s largest enterprises, supporting 158 countries, 40+ Tier-1 carriers, and 99.9% uptime SLAs. 
### How does Zendesk Contact Center impact my agents’ productivity?
Because it’s built into the same Zendesk platform your teams already use, agents can onboard quickly and stay productive without learning new tools. AI handles note-taking, summarization, and after-call work automatically, while real-time guidance and QA insights keep performance high. The result is a faster, simpler, and more efficient experience where agents spend less time managing systems and more time resolving customer issues.
### How does Zendesk support compliance in regulated industries?
Zendesk Contact Center is compliant with GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2 Type II, and supports data residency controls for voice recordings. Customers in healthcare, finance, and government rely on Zendesk for its security-first architecture.
### What makes Zendesk Contact Center different from other CCaaS voice solutions?
Legacy vendors offer powerful contact center capabilities. However, we understand that AI has laid a new foundation for contact centers without the same limitations of voice technology. We differentiate ourselves by blending those same capabilities with what we already do best as a partner. Zendesk Contact Center replaces traditional complexity with AI-powered simplicity, offering a unified platform that’s faster to implement, easier to manage, and ready to scale globally.

Zendesk uses web cookies to collect information about you when you visit our Site. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device. At Zendesk, we may use this information for purposes that include ensuring basic functionality of our Sites; remembering user preferences, including your cookie preferences; measuring the effectiveness of our Sites, marketing campaigns, and email communications; and personalizing online content.
Please review the different category headings below to learn more and adjust the cookie settings on your current device. Please note that you will need to ensure that each web browser is adjusted to reflect your preferences if you use different computers or mobile devices.

Functional Cookies
Functional cookies enable the Site to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our Site.

#### Analytics Cookies
Analytics Cookies
Analytics cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our Site. These cookies help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the Site.

#### Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Targeting cookies, such as social media cookies, may be set through our Site by our advertising service providers, third-party advertisers, ad networks, or data exchange partners. These cookies may be used to show you relevant advertising on other third-party sites.
